notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Rangers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Wyatt Langford steals (4) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Kody Clemens. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Alejandro Osuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith pops out to catcher Alex Jackson in foul territory.
